name: Seafoam
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the light brown sugar, granulated sugar, cold water, vinegar, egg whites, salt, and vanilla in a saucepan.
2. Heat over medium heat until the mixture reaches the soft ball stage (236°F).
3. Remove from the stove and carefully pour the hot syrup into a separate bowl with beaten egg whites and salt.
4. Gradually add the hot syrup to the egg whites, beating well after each addition.
5. When the mixture begins to stiffen, stir in the vanilla and chopped nuts.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the batter onto waxed paper to cool.
7. Repeat until you have made 2 dozen cookies.
Makes: 2 dozen
